nasb.text: Then on the fourth day they assembled in the valley of Beracah, for there they blessed the Lord. Therefore they have named that place “The Valley of Beracah” until today.

esv.text: On the fourth day they assembled in the Valley of Beracah, for there they blessed the Lord. Therefore the name of that place has been called the Valley of Beracah to this day.

cnv.text: 第四日，他們聚集在比拉迦谷，在那裡稱頌耶和華，因此那地方名叫比拉迦谷，直到今日。

ccb.text: 第四天，他们聚集到一个山谷，一起称颂耶和华。那里从此名叫比拉迦谷，直到今天。
